title: Simple Paraglider
body:
This mod adds a simple paraglider, which can be used to glide in the air. The glider has a limited turning speed, which can be configured. This mod also has compatibility with Elenai Dodge 2 -- using the glider will consume feathers. (This can be disabled in the config.)

 

Recipe:  
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/923896203635224607/1095175783217119282/image.png)

A note on Elenai Dodge 2 and dedicated servers:
Elenai Dodge 2 has an issue in its API that causes a crash on dedicated servers. However, this issue is fixed by Universal Tweaks. The Elenai Dodge 2 compatibility is disabled by default on dedicated servers where Universal Tweaks is not installed in order to prevent crashes.
